name: Abigail Nebula
description: the embodiment of purity, and daughter of eric the embodiment of evil. she spends her time trying to make up for her fathers actions by doing as much good as she can. 4th most powerful being in existence. other then her pure white hair she looks completely human.(she dose not have freaking wings!) disengaged to Riley the god of swords, however she still love's him and he just want's to see her smile.
